125ff7d9-1d77-49d2-ae24-dd980929c80b.text:
Hudon can't hear you because of the noise of the waterfall.
Perhaps the acoustics would be better from that island?

c1f86cd3-4924-436a-b61a-e992066b773d.title: Note
c1f86cd3-4924-436a-b61a-e992066b773d.text: When trying to talk to him when not on the island.

ea417cec-7d44-4311-b620-14b292eb8e81.title: Hudon
ea417cec-7d44-4311-b620-14b292eb8e81.text:
Don't play nice with me, I know you're looking for the
treasure too.

89e51a35-62c2-41fe-962d-6320e2c29acb.title: <player>
89e51a35-62c2-41fe-962d-6320e2c29acb.text: Your mum sent me to find you.

e277847a-6723-4c4d-9886-3e926fc6e1dc.title: Hudon
e277847a-6723-4c4d-9886-3e926fc6e1dc.text:
I'll go home when I've found the treasure. I'm going to
be a rich rich man.

208b801a-6c36-4ce4-9297-2ca94e6d4b19.title: <player>
208b801a-6c36-4ce4-9297-2ca94e6d4b19.text: Where is this treasure you talk of?

bf703074-7e66-4c36-9d3e-7cf9c366a068.title: Hudon
bf703074-7e66-4c36-9d3e-7cf9c366a068.text:
Just because I'm small doesn't mean I'm dumb! If I
told you, you would take it all for yourself.

fa88a978-df80-463c-980c-fbf73171ef53.title: <player>
fa88a978-df80-463c-980c-fbf73171ef53.text: Hmm... I wonder what this treasure is.

6aaf6f45-ae6a-44dc-b98e-669e44523a75.title: Hudon
6aaf6f45-ae6a-44dc-b98e-669e44523a75.text: I'll find that treasure soon, just you wait and see.

d22df648-2e84-4d1d-a26f-be94b913f07d.title: Hudon
d22df648-2e84-4d1d-a26f-be94b913f07d.text: Oh it's you, trying to find my treasure again are you?

ebd399e8-cf86-46dc-9fcf-021984540414.title: <player>
ebd399e8-cf86-46dc-9fcf-021984540414.text: I didn't know it belonged to you.

37ec7696-a701-4a41-9bbe-c4d6b07b7404.title: Hudon
37ec7696-a701-4a41-9bbe-c4d6b07b7404.text:
It will do when I find it. I just need to get into this
blasted waterfall I've been washed downstream three
times already.

c81d7a22-c8a4-48d5-a187-a0211f5bbae1.title: Hudon
c81d7a22-c8a4-48d5-a187-a0211f5bbae1.text: Not you still, why don't you give up?

31bb9591-4834-4cbe-9125-9b7039ee8bbc.title: Hudon
31bb9591-4834-4cbe-9125-9b7039ee8bbc.text:
You do understand that anything you find you have to
share with me.

3ad6e742-2db6-4081-9ecd-6a1480bcd00c.title: Hudon
3ad6e742-2db6-4081-9ecd-6a1480bcd00c.text: Because I told you about the treasure.

812d479a-3a75-4cb6-bf7a-dc4a0496baa0.title: <player>
812d479a-3a75-4cb6-bf7a-dc4a0496baa0.text: Well, I wouldn't count on it.

5418ff53-79c7-4621-a31f-7e5d68ae4c98.title: <player>
5418ff53-79c7-4621-a31f-7e5d68ae4c98.text: Me neither. but I don't give up easily.

02055371-b85e-44ab-8d27-8d250c8d17b8.title: Hudon
02055371-b85e-44ab-8d27-8d250c8d17b8.text: You stole my treasure. I saw you!

f9490420-c94e-4a3e-b423-d4139fd965db.title: <player>
f9490420-c94e-4a3e-b423-d4139fd965db.text: I'll make sure it goes to a good cause.
